---
id: update-source-selection
title: "Update source selection"
description: "Update which containers (repos, drives, spaces) a source should index. Pass an empty array to index all available containers."
sidebar_label: "Update source selection"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: core/api_reference/sercha-core-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update source selection"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/sources/{id}/selection"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update which containers (repos, drives, spaces) a source should index. Pass an empty array to index all available containers.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"Source ID","in":"path","name":"id","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"Request to update which containers a source should index","properties":{"selected_containers":{"description":"SelectedContainers is the list of container IDs to index.\nEmpty list means index all available containers.","example":["[\"octocat/hello-world\"","\"octocat/spoon-knife\"]"],"items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"}},"type":"object"}}},"description":"Container selection","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"Simple status response","properties":{"status":{"example":"ok","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"400":{"description":"Invalid request","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - admin only","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"404":{"description":"Source not found","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
